title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain LLM, embeddings, and chat interfaces.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, RAG, multi-user) packaged in a single Docker container.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama exposing sync/async APIs, streaming, and model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints with idiomatic Ruby syntax and streaming support.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: NPM installable CLI that wraps ollama-js for quick generate/chat commands and model pulls.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official reference stacks: CPU-only, GPU (NVIDIA/AMD), and OpenAI-compatible bridge via Docker Compose.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models, dependency-injection helpers, and streaming IAsyncEnumerable.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/tokio bindings to Ollama’s REST API with serde models.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat, image captioning, and model switching to any server.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat UI that talks to your local Ollama instance with session memory and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete, summarization, and note Q&A powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to invoke Ollama models inside no-code workflows (chat, generate, embed).

title: ollama-rag-langchain-tutorial
summary: Step-by-step repo showing how to build a private RAG system with Ollama, LangChain, and Chroma.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated collection of Modelfiles for fine-tuned, niche, and experimental GGUF models ready for ollama pull.
